name: 2pk Striped Deep Patio Furniture Cushion Set Black - Threshold™
description:
Bring a sophisticated charm to your dwelling with this 2-Piece Striped Deep Patio Furniture Cushion Set from Threshold™. This set includes a chair seat cushion and a back cushion with polyester filling to deliver a relaxing seating experience. Made of 100% recycled polyester, these cushions feature black stripes on a white backdrop for a timeless look. Designed with a zipper closure for a neat finish, this fade-resistant cushion set stays fresh season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
